measures.title: Renewal of Residential Street Utility Tax
measures.what_it_does: Renews Cheney's tax on electrical energy and natural gas businesses to 16.75% of gross revenue for 14 years, with proceeds used to repair streets and sidewalks.
measures.cost_line: Renews a utility tax rate six percentage points above the otherwise authorized 10.75% rate for 14 years.

taxes.basis: YES renews a utility tax for street and sidewalk repair.
